item.title: The event is next month - talks are Friday 15th to Sunday 17th of May, with the date before that of ...
item.description:
The event is next month - talks are Friday 15th to Sunday 17th of May, with the date before that of tutorials and two days afterwards of sprints
Californians are notoriously last-minute planners so I know that's enough time to decide to come join us!
--- @simonw | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 798
item.author: @simonw
